title: スプリンターズSの後に・証明？

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... I... went all out!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin O! That was some great racing out
there.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You're very fast, Bakushin O. I couldn't keep up
with you at all...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But besides that, I'm glad I was able to run with
you today.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...I see. I suppose this means—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You must really look up to me!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm quite fast. It's only right you do.
However!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You have your very own Flower Road. You must
go down that path with Bakushin haste!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, okay?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm back from my race!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: But of course! I'm the class representative.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
However, Flower was very fast in her own right.
To tell you the truth, it did get quite close here
and there.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I had my first experience of this so called
"pressure" that everyone talks about!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, this time around, I was able to show the
people that I am the better one!
choice_data_list:
But in the end, you were basically evenly
matched.

text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower was strong competition, just as I
expected. There's a good chance she'll overtake
Bakushin O if we move away from doing sprints...
choice_data_list: Don't you want to win by a greater margin?
Don't you want to win by a greater margin?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well, of course I do. No one should be able to
keep up with a true class representative!
choice_data_list: Then you'll need even more speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Speed! Wait, more?! When I'm already this fast?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Gulp. What if these legs of mine give in?!
choice_data_list: Let's perfect your form with sprint training.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I see! I'll need this if I want to Bakushin my way up
to senior year!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Basically what you're saying is that if I beat
Flower by a real lot, I can try out for
medium-distance, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Understood! Let's win against Flower one more
time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll go ask her what she plans to run in next!
choice_data_list: I think she'll go for the Takamatsunomiya Kinen.
I think she'll go for the Takamatsunomiya Kinen.

text_block_list.text:
Just like the Sprinters Stakes, it's a 1,200-meter
G1 race. Since Flower didn't win this time around,
I'm confident in saying she will try her hand at it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see! Then I too will run in the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: With this, I will prove my speed to all...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? I feel like we've talked about this before.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Last time it went a little something like... this?
Wait, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAKUSHIN OOO!
